story_summary: A tenant finds an abandoned phone that starts receiving voice notes from a version of himself warning that someone in the building has already replaced him.
full_story_script: I found the phone under the twelfth step... (full script here)
narration_script: I found the phone under the twelfth step. It was raining outside, and the stairwell smelled like wet concrete...
youtube_description:
I never planned to share this, but what happened in my building still keeps me awake...

If you want more anonymous confessions and suspense stories, subscribe and turn on notifications.

scenes.story_text: I noticed a cracked phone wedged under the stairwell step after midnight...
scenes.image_prompt: narrow apartment stairwell at night, cracked phone under concrete step, wet floor reflections, dim overhead bulb, distant shadow figure at landing, dark cinematic suspense, realistic, low saturation, moody lighting, no gore, no visible face

scenes.story_text: The screen lit up with an unknown notification and a voice that sounded exactly like me...
scenes.image_prompt: close view of old phone screen glowing in dark room, notebook and keys on table, rain streaks on window, back-view silhouette in doorway, eerie realistic cinematic style, low saturation, no gore, no visible face

scenes.story_text: The message said not to open the basement door, which was already unlocked...
